I like the navigation bar a the page top
	* It should Read - Conquer v5, Play Game, Worlds List, Manage Worlds, Documentation.  
	* Conquer v5 -> Has No action associated
	* This navigation bar should show on all screens generated by the application
	* Documentation is a separate feature which opens a new tab with the documentation as it exists now - http://localhost:5174/docs/index.html
		* The documentation should be in a directory as a stand alone set of html i can publish separately (no nav bar).
		* The home page should be the navigation bar plus a line and then the documentation
		* The documentation page the same as the home page. 
	* summary: if served by the web server we always have the navigation bar.  The documentation in docs/index.html will show under the nav bar (perhaps in a fram or whatever you want) but i can separately publish the docs directory as a standalone (and nothing in there has links)

The game version should be 2026 not v5... so that should read "Conquer 2026".
	* change this globally

On Manage Worlds, change some text
	Init Map -> remove - this functionality should move to the world creation
	Enable Maint -> Enable Maintenance Mode
	seed (opt) -> Game Seed (optional/number) - seed should be enforced as a number
	Add 	Number of Active Players to the top bar
		maximum number of users allowed in the world
	
On Manage Worlds, change the actions for +New World
	In addition to new world name add world parameters such as world size 
	If it does not exist, add a parameter for maximum number of users allowed in the world

On the Open Worlds Tab, each world should have Continue -or- Join (if you are not a member of that world).  
	If you join, you are added to the world
	Enforce the maximum number of users per world value from the world
	Worlds in which you are an admin come first, then worlds in which you are playing, then other worlds 
		* alphabetically by world name within the grouping
